title: Sign in and reach the dashboard home view
description: This test verifies that a traveler can complete the mock sign-in flow and land on the dashboard home view with the active finance summary visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the dashboard home view is displayed
Verify the active finance summary is visible

title: Mock sign-in opens the dashboard home view
description: This test verifies that a user can complete the mock login and land on the dashboard home view with the active finance summary visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the login credentials with valid values
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the dashboard home view is displayed
Verify the active finance summary is visible

title: Bottom navigation switches between main sections
description: This test verifies that a signed-in user can move between Home, Expenses, Budget, and Trips and see the correct section content and active state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Open the expenses section from the bottom navigation
Open the budget section from the bottom navigation
Open the trips section from the bottom navigation
Return to the home section from the bottom navigation
Verify each main section displays the correct content when selected
Verify the active navigation state follows the selected section

title: Home navigation shows the overview section
description: This test verifies that selecting Home returns the user to the dashboard overview with the home content visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the login credentials with valid values
Submit the sign-in form
Select Home from the bottom navigation
Verify the home dashboard content is displayed
Verify the home navigation state is active

title: Expenses navigation shows the payments section
description: This test verifies that selecting Expenses opens the payments section with the expenses content visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the login credentials with valid values
Submit the sign-in form
Select Expenses from the bottom navigation
Verify the expenses section is displayed
Verify the expenses navigation state is active

title: Create a trip fund and select it for tracking
description: This test verifies that a traveler can create a trip fund, see it added to the list, and select it as the active tracking fund.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Open the trips section
Choose the trip fund mode
Fill in the fund name with a new trip fund name
Fill in the target amount with a valid amount
Create the new trip fund
Select the created fund from the list
Verify the new trip fund appears in the list
Verify the created fund is the active tracking fund

title: Navigation switches between all main sections
description: This test verifies that the bottom navigation moves the user across Home, Expenses, Budget, and Trips with the visible content changing each time.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the login credentials with valid values
Submit the sign-in form
Select Home from the bottom navigation
Select Expenses from the bottom navigation
Select Budget from the bottom navigation
Select Trips from the bottom navigation
Verify the trips section is displayed
Verify the trips navigation state is active

title: Create a month fund and select it for tracking
description: This test verifies that a household budget manager can create a month fund, see it added to the list, and select it as the active tracking fund.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Open the budget section
Choose the month fund mode
Fill in the fund name with a new month fund name
Fill in the target amount with a valid amount
Create the new month fund
Select the created fund from the list
Verify the new fund appears in the list
Verify the created fund is the active tracking fund

title: Create a payment in the selected fund
description: This test verifies that a user can add a payment in Expenses and see the payment appear with updated saved and remaining totals.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the login credentials with valid values
Submit the sign-in form
Select Expenses from the bottom navigation
Enter a payment name
Enter a payment amount
Enter who paid for the payment
Choose a valid payment date
Enter an optional payment note
Save the payment
Verify the new payment appears in the payment list
Verify the saved and remaining totals update

title: Delete an existing payment from Expenses
description: This test verifies that a user can remove an existing payment and see the list and totals update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the login credentials with valid values
Submit the sign-in form
Select Expenses from the bottom navigation
Locate an existing payment
Delete the selected payment
Verify the payment no longer appears in the list
Verify the saved and remaining totals update

title: Home view shows key budget snapshot metrics
description: This test verifies that a signed-in user can review the essential dashboard metrics for remaining funds, spending, breakdowns, recent activity, and daily allowance.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify remaining funds, total budget, and spent amount are displayed
Verify category breakdown, recent expenses, and daily allowance are displayed

title: Budget navigation shows the budget section
description: This test verifies that selecting Budget opens the budget section with the budget content visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the login credentials with valid values
Submit the sign-in form
Select Budget from the bottom navigation
Verify the budget section is displayed
Verify the budget navigation state is active

title: Trips navigation shows the trip funds section
description: This test verifies that selecting Trips opens the trips section with the trip content visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the login credentials with valid values
Submit the sign-in form
Select Trips from the bottom navigation
Verify the trips section is displayed
Verify the trips navigation state is active

title: Delete a recently created payment
description: This test verifies that a user can create a payment and then remove it from the same session while the totals return to their prior state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the login credentials with valid values
Submit the sign-in form
Select Expenses from the bottom navigation
Enter a payment name
Enter a payment amount
Enter who paid for the payment
Choose a valid payment date
Save the payment
Delete the newly created payment
Verify the payment no longer appears in the list
Verify the totals return to the previous state

title: Create a payment with a minimal optional note setup
description: This test verifies that a user can save a payment successfully while leaving the optional note empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the login credentials with valid values
Submit the sign-in form
Select Expenses from the bottom navigation
Enter a payment name
Enter a payment amount
Enter who paid for the payment
Choose a valid payment date
Leave the optional payment note empty
Save the payment
Verify the new payment appears in the payment list
Verify the totals update after saving

title: Switch between month and trip fund creation modes
description: This test verifies that a user can switch fund creation modes while staying in the budgeting area and see the corresponding creation form update.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Open the budget section
Choose the trip fund mode
Choose the month fund mode
Verify the month fund creation form is displayed
Verify the trip fund creation form is not displayed

title: Remember me can be toggled during sign in
description: This test verifies that a demo user can toggle the remember-me option before signing in and still reach the dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Toggle the remember-me option
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the dashboard home view is displayed

title: View All opens the expenses section from home
description: This test verifies that a signed-in user can move from the home dashboard to the expenses section using the overview shortcut.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Open the expenses section from the home overview
Verify the expenses section is displayed

title: Floating add shortcut opens expenses
description: This test verifies that a signed-in user can use the floating add shortcut to reach the expenses workflow quickly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Use the floating add shortcut to open expenses
Verify the expenses section is displayed

title: Invalid email is rejected on sign in
description: This test verifies that the mock login shows validation feedback when the email format is invalid and the user does not enter the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with invalid-email
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Empty password is rejected on sign in
description: This test verifies that the mock login shows validation feedback when the password is missing and the user does not enter the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Leave the password field empty
Submit the sign-in form
Verify a password validation error is visible
